overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas - The Definitive Edition, showing protagonist CJ running from a beachfront promenade across Santa Maria Beach and into the ocean, with the iconic pier and Ferris wheel visible in the background.

events.description: CJ transitions from walking to running along the promenade
camera passes through sun flare creating lens effect

agents.ego_description: CJ runs along the concrete promenade past a parked blue station wagon toward a skate ramp structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking away from camera near the skate ramp

entered.detail: concrete skateboarding structure with stairs and curved surfaces
tall palm trees lining the beachfront promenade
multi-story buildings with balconies behind the promenade
parked blue vehicle on the side of the path

segments.scene_description: CJ runs along a sunny beachfront promenade with palm trees and buildings on the left. He passes a parked blue car and approaches a concrete skate park ramp while the sun creates a lens flare in the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden boardwalk transition to sandy beach

events.description: steps from concrete pavement onto wooden boardwalk
leaves boardwalk and steps onto sand

agents.ego_description: CJ runs across the wooden boardwalk and onto the sandy beach, weaving between beachgoers

notable_agents.action: beachgoer in orange shorts running across the sand

entered.detail: wooden plank walkway leading over dunes to the beach
expansive sandy beach area with scattered visitors
white lifeguard tower on the beach
long pier structure with large Ferris wheel at the end

segments.scene_description: CJ transitions from the concrete promenade onto a wooden boardwalk, then onto the sand. The beach opens up with more pedestrians visible, and the Santa Maria Pier with its Ferris wheel appears in the distance on the right.

events.description: CJ slows from running to walking as approaching the waterline
passing close to a lifeguard tower on the left

agents.ego_description: CJ walks across the sand toward the ocean, passing other beach visitors and approaching the waterline

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt walking past CJ toward the water

entered.detail: calm blue ocean water meeting the horizon
gentle breaking waves with white foam

segments.scene_description: CJ continues across the sandy beach toward the ocean, with the pier growing larger on the right. He passes a lifeguard tower and other beachgoers as the waves become visible in the distance, then slows to a walk as he nears the water.

events.description: CJ steps from sand into the shallow ocean water
CJ stops walking and stands in the surf looking out at the ocean

agents.ego_description: CJ walks into the shallow ocean water and stops as waves wash around his feet, looking out toward the horizon

segments.scene_description: CJ enters the ocean, with waves lapping at his feet. He stops in the shallow water and looks out toward the horizon, with the pier now behind him to the right and the coastline stretching into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as CJ runs from a sunny urban promenade across a wide beach and into the ocean. It begins along a paved beachfront lined with palm trees and buildings, passing a parked blue car and a concrete skate park ramp under a bright sun that creates a lens flare. As the terrain shifts, the camera follows CJ from the concrete onto a wooden boardwalk and then onto the sand, where the landscape opens up to reveal pedestrians and the distant Santa Maria Pier with its Ferris wheel. The scene then expands across the sandy beach, passing a lifeguard tower and other beachgoers as the pier grows larger on the right and the waves appear ahead. Finally, the movement slows as CJ enters the shallow water, stopping to look toward the horizon with the pier now behind him and the coastline stretching into the distance.
